---
title: "01. еИЫзФЯдЄОзЇѓжАБ"
subtitle: "Primal Creation and Pure States"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 1
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How дєЊгАБеЭ§гАБж≥∞гАБеР¶ map the raw 6-bit state space, pure binary extremes, and primal 3+3 partition structure onto the golden-mean shift, Fibonacci growth, and modular tower."
---

**Hexagrams:** дєЊ(1), еЭ§(2), ж≥∞(11), еР¶(12)  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `Fibonacci growth`, `modular tower inverse limit`

{{< include articles/category_01_primal_creation_pure_states.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## NotebookLM Slides

[Download Slides (PDF)](../../media/cultural/i-ching/category_01_primal_creation_pure_states_slides.pdf)
